spec.name: The Common Seating
spec.description: This is where many of the common Roman citizens are seated during the games. These are the cheapest seats in the house, as glare from the sun is usually a problem during the afternoon. Like the other common seating areas, this place could stand extensive renovation and a thorough cleaning. This area extends to the south and a much more elegant seating area can be seen to the west.

west.description: The seating gets much fancier and elegant in that direction.
